items.title: Did the Broncos' release of Russell Wilson change ...
items.body_text: The Broncos took a then-record $85 million dead money hit by parting with Wilson in 2024, but their quick turnaround has turned heads.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Sources: Saints bring back franchise star Jordan
items.body_text: Saints defensive end Cameron Jordan will end his career in New Orleans after signing a one-year deal during the team's minicamp.
items.author: Ian Rapoport and Katherine Terrell

items.title: Broncos excuse Cooper from minicamp after arrests
items.body_text: The Broncos excused OLB Jonathon Cooper from their mandatory minicamp this week after he was arrested twice in a seven-day span on multiple domestic violence charges, including one felony.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Pickens at Cowboys minicamp, OK with franchise tag...
items.body_text: After skipping the voluntary part of the Cowboys' offseason program, Dallas wide receiver George Pickens worked out with the team Tuesday, the first day of mandatory minicamp, telling reporters he is prepared to play the 2026 season on the franchise tag.
items.author: Todd Archer

items.title: Nix on track, says 2nd surgery was for bone spurs
items.body_text: Broncos quarterback Bo Nix made his first appearance in a full offseason practice Tuesday and said he remains on track to be ready for training camp next month.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Family to have Smith's brain checked for CTE
items.body_text: The family of Aldon Smith has decided to send his brain to medical experts in Boston to see whether CTE played a role in the former NFL defensive lineman's death.

items.title: Chiefs' Rice released from jail, dodges reporters
items.body_text: Chiefs WR Rashee Rice was released from a Dallas County jail on Tuesday after serving a 30-day sentence for violating the terms of his probation.

items.title: Bucs' Mayfield pushes back on durability concerns
items.body_text: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield pushed back Tuesday at the notion that he needs to better protect himself while adding that he and the team are not close on contract negotiations.
items.author: Jenna Laine

items.title: Penix expects to practice in full by training camp...
items.body_text: Falcons quarterback Michael Penix Jr. has not yet taken part in full practices, but said on Tuesday he expects to be full go by training camp in July.
items.author: Marc Raimondi

items.title: 🤣 Jaguars to auction Trevor Lawrence's viral wig
items.body_text: The original haircut video, released May 14 as part of the NFL's annual schedule release, caused a stir -- it has 3.8 million views as of June 16.
